candidates.why: This is the explicit operating D&A line tied to cost of revenues and appears as a separate same-level line alongside the selected COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue', not as an indented subcomponent beneath it. Therefore it should be added separately relative to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This D&A line belongs to SG&A, not to cost of revenues, so it is not relevant for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS-related depreciation row because it is separately disclosed above operating profit and appears outside the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the explicit operating D&A line tied to SG&A and appears as a separate same-level line alongside the selected XSGA bucket 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total', so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in the selected SG&A total.
This D&A line belongs to cost of revenues, not SG&A, so it is not relevant for XSGA_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A-related depreciation row because it is separately disclosed above operating profit and sits outside the selected XSGA bucket. No separate R&D amortization row is present, so no additional R&D-specific D&A row is added.
